YOUR MUSIC CAREER OS ‚ÄĒ Intro
BEFORE YOU START
A quick heads-up
RAPCLASS runs entirely in your browser. Nothing you type, save, or upload leaves your device.
Privacy
No accounts, no analytics, no tracking. All data is local to this browser. You can export or wipe it any time from Settings.
Vision board uploads
Reference images for personal inspiration only ‚ÄĒ don't upload assets you don't have permission to use as personal reference.
Use
Personal, non-commercial educational use. As-is, no warranty.

No wrong answers. Just helps us set you up right.

SIMPLE MODE Want more features? Tap the Simple button up top to switch to Full Mode.

HI! WHAT DO YOU WANT TO DO TODAY?

Pick any of the boxes below. Each one is a small task you can do right now to help your music career.

There is no wrong place to start. Take your time. You can come back whenever you want.

‚Üď Click a box to begin
Welcome ‚ÄĒ Start Here ‚Ėľ
This app helps you build a music career, one small step at a time. You do not need to know anything about the music business to use it.

There are four big topics to explore: Human (taking care of yourself), Business (the money side), Growth (getting more fans), and Artistry (making your music). Pick any one to start.

Inside each topic you will find:
‚ÄĘ Lessons ‚ÄĒ short readings that teach you one idea.
‚ÄĘ Guides ‚ÄĒ step-by-step walkthroughs for real tasks.
‚ÄĘ Worksheets ‚ÄĒ fill-in pages to plan and keep notes.
‚ÄĘ Goals ‚ÄĒ a place to write down what you want and track it.
‚ÄĘ Money ‚ÄĒ a simple spot to see where your cash goes.

There is no wrong place to start. Click anything that looks interesting. Come back whenever you want.

MONEY
See where your money goes ‚ÄĒ personal and music business
‚ö† Watch Your Spending $0
Personal Spending
No personal spending added yet.
Music Business Spending
No music business spending added yet.
Personal
Personal Spending
Rent, food, transport, phone, family, savings. See where your own money goes each month.
Music Business
Music Spending
Studio time, promo, merch, gear, travel. See every dollar your music spends and what it brings back.
Monthly Guide
Money Check-in
A simple monthly walk-through. Where did your money go? What do you want to change? Build the habit of checking every 30 days.
Are You Growing?
Progress Check
Is your work actually paying off? Check 8 simple signs across fans, engagement, content, and money.
Worksheet
Progress Worksheet
Fill this out for any month or quarter. Rate each area and pick the one thing to focus on next.
Every 3 Months
Big-Picture Check
Sit down and look at the whole picture. What is working? What is not? Pick the next three things to focus on.
CHECK IN
Check in with yourself. Turn emotions into career action.
Tap how you feel today. We'll suggest a small move that matches your energy ‚ÄĒ no judgment.
Vision Board
Upload mood boards, visual references, and creative inspiration for your brand.
ROI CHECK
Before spending money, ask: how will this create more revenue?

Export My Data
Download your worksheets, goals, and progress as a JSON file.
ūüď≤ Save As App
Download this page as a file you can open offline on your phone or computer. Works without internet once saved.
Trust & Policies
ūüĒí Your data stays here
RAPCLASS has no server, no account system, and no analytics. Everything you type, save, or upload lives in this browser only ‚ÄĒ nobody at RAPCLASS can see it. Use Export My Data above to take it with you, or Clear Progress to wipe it.
PRIVACY POLICY ‚Ėł
What we collect: nothing. RAPCLASS is a static web page. There is no backend, no database, no third-party analytics, no advertising network.

Where your data lives: in your browser's local storage on this device. Clearing your browser data, switching devices, or using incognito mode will not carry it over.

External requests: on first load the page fetches Google Fonts and the DOMPurify security library from a CDN. Those providers may see your IP address as part of the standard internet handshake. No identifiers are sent.

Children: RAPCLASS is intended for users 13 and over. If you are under 13, please don't use this app. When optional Google Sign-In is added in the future, an explicit age verification step will be required.

Your rights: your data is yours. Export or delete it anytime from this Settings page.
ACCEPTABLE USE ‚Ėł
RAPCLASS is for personal, non-commercial educational use.

The vision board is for inspiration reference only. Don't upload music, lyrics, album artwork, or any other media you don't have permission to use as a personal reference. RAPCLASS does not host, distribute, or share any uploaded image ‚ÄĒ they live on your device ‚ÄĒ but please respect creators all the same.

Don't use RAPCLASS to plan, document, or coordinate harassment, threats, or illegal activity. Artistic expression in your private worksheets is yours.
COPYRIGHT & DMCA ‚Ėł
RAPCLASS does not host or transmit user-uploaded files. The vision board stores reference images on your device only. Because nothing is published or shared through RAPCLASS, there is nothing for us to take down.

If you believe an image stored in your local vision board belongs to you and you'd like guidance on best-practice fair use, or if you have a copyright concern about RAPCLASS itself, contact dimdopeindeedmanagement@gmail.com. We'll respond within 10 business days.
TERMS ‚Ėł
RAPCLASS is provided as-is, without warranty of any kind. The curriculum reflects opinions and experience, not legal, financial, medical, or career advice. Decisions you make about your career are your own.

You retain ownership of everything you create or import into RAPCLASS. RAPCLASS claims no rights over your worksheets, goals, or vision board.

These terms may be updated. Material changes will be flagged on first launch after they take effect.
SECURITY ‚Ėł
RAPCLASS uses Content Security Policy, Trusted Types, Subresource Integrity on third-party scripts, sanitization on every dynamic HTML write, and validated image uploads. If you find a vulnerability, please disclose it responsibly to dimdopeindeedmanagement@gmail.com. Payouts are negotiated case-by-case.
